cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out this ethical dilemma about graffiti on private property. Let me start by breaking down the problem. The person is an artist who used graffiti as a medium. Their latest work is on private property without permission. The question is whether they should leave it (freedom of expression) or remove it (respecting property rights).
